name: White Bean and Sausage Rigatoni
recipeIngredient: 1/2 package Of a 10 oz pk frozen chopped spinach, thawed
1 can 15 oz great northern beans, rinsed and drained
1/4 cup Red wine or chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, cook the pasta according to instructions. Drain and return to the pan.
2. Bias-slice the kielbasa. Drain the thawed spinach well.
3. Add the sliced kielbassa, spinach, tomatoes, beans, tomato paste, wine or broth, and Italian seasoning to the cooked pasta. Stir to mix.
4. Spoon the mixture into a 2 quart casserole dish. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
5. Bake, uncovered, in a 375°F oven for 25-30 minutes, or until hot and bubbly.
